description.value:
The quintessential two-handed blade, a greatsword combines reach, power, and precision into a single imposing weapon. Its keen edge and heavy construction let it stagger foes and carve through armor.

Training

LevelProperties
UntrainedTwo-Handed, Heavy, Melee 2d6, Slashing
BasicTwo-Handed, Heavy, Melee 2d8, Keen, Stagger
MasterTwo-Handed, Heavy, Melee 2d8, Keen, Stagger â€” all bonuses apply
Master PerkAgainst Large or larger creatures, this weapon deals 2d12 damage instead of 2d10.

rmeData.masterPerk: Against Large or larger creatures, this weapon deals 2d12 damage instead of 2d10.
